title: Order #A001 Shipping Delay
description: Dingxin Software (CUS-1101) Manager Zhou reports: Order #A001 was placed a week ago and includes Smart Router X1 and Switch S200, but has not shipped yet. The customer has followed up multiple times. Please handle urgently.

title: Order #A002 Shipping Delay
description: Hanhai E-commerce (CUS-1102) Director Lin reports: Order #A002 (Switch S200 and Firewall F500) is 5 days past the promised delivery date, impacting their data center deployment schedule.

title: Order #A003 Products Out of Stock
description: Wantong Logistics (CUS-1103) Director Zhao urgently reports: Order #A003 includes Smart Router X1, Firewall F500, and Fiber Optic Modules. Customer service replied that items are out of stock but could not provide an estimated restock date. As a VIP customer, they demand a definitive response.

title: Software Login Error
description: Qianfeng Technology (CUS-1104) Engineer Zhang reports: The admin dashboard occasionally returns a 502 error during login, requiring 2-3 page refreshes to gain access.

title: Invoice Information Correction
description: Dingxin Software (CUS-1101) Finance Department requests a correction to last month's invoice billing information. The tax ID was incorrect and needs to be reissued.
